---
title: "Edy Reynolds"
image: images/Professional_Headshot.JPG

format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/edy-reynolds
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/edyrey/edyrey
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf-fill
      text: Resume
      href: REYNOLDS_EDY_RESUME.pdf
resources: 
  - REYNOLDS_EDY_RESUME.pdf
---

**B.S. in Statistics with a minor in Economics from California Polytechnic State University, San Luis Obispo - 2021-2025**

Welcome to the hub for my resume, cover letter, projects, etc.

*If you have any questions, comments, or concerns you can contact me at edyreynolds13@gmail.com*
